Name: terrain_bed
Comment: Bedrock depth ramp. Warm browns chosen to sit opposite c16's cool teal/slate ice. Shallow bed (high ground) is a light ochre, deep bed (valleys) a very dark warm brown. It deliberately stops short of black: under a path tracer a pure-black surface returns no light and loses all form, so the darkest stop keeps luminance near 0.02 with hue intact.
